changes: sync.py v3.6.5: Real activity/event IDs (opaque keys, not PII). coach_notes + chat_notes arrays for AI annotation round-trip

sync.py v3.7: Phase detection v2 — dual-stream (retrospective history + prospective calendar). 8 states, confidence scoring, reason codes, hysteresis. weekly_180d enriched with per-week phase, acwr, monotony
sync.py v3.71: HRRc (heart rate recovery) — per-activity + 7d/28d aggregate trend in capability namespace. Display only
sync.py v3.72: Readiness Decision — deterministic go/modify/skip via P0-P3 priority ladder. 7 signals (HRV/RHR/Sleep/TSB/ACWR/Feel/RI) with phase-adjusted thresholds. Replaces phantom AAS
sync.py v3.73: Phase detection fix — prospective windows aligned to training week (configurable via WEEK_START secret/config/env, default Monday). Fixes mid-week deload misclassification
sync.py v3.74: Null-safe handling for planned event fields (moving_time, description). auto-sync.yml git config fix for README update step
push.py v0.3: set-threshold (sport-specific FTP/LTHR updates with preview), annotate (notes on activities/events via description or chat). push-workout.yml for GitHub Actions dispatch
SECTION_11.md v11.11→v11.13: Phase detection criteria, HRRc, Readiness Decision section. AAS replaced with deterministic priority ladder
Report templates: Phase narrative (weekly/block), HRRc (all templates), readiness_decision (pre-workout), EF added. XhYm formatting throughout
auto-sync.yml: WEEK_START secret support, archive monthly subdirectories (archive/YYYY-MM/)
Documentation: Gemini platform guidance, WEEK_START setup in all SETUP files, private repo access updates, WORKOUT_REFERENCE rewrite
Upgrade note: After updating sync.py, delete history.json and run twice — first run regenerates history, second run uses it for phase detection
sync.py v3.6.2→3.6.4: Planned workout summaries — interval sessions compressed to one-line shapes. Tiered detail: full days 0-7, skeleton days 8-42. Human-readable time fields (XhYm) throughout

push.py v0.2 + push-workout.yml: Write planned workouts to Intervals.icu calendar (push, list, move, delete). GitHub Actions dispatch or local CLI. Template ID mappings for all 14 Workout Reference sessions
Report templates: All report templates and examples updated with XhYm formatting + Formatting Rule section
